events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves fall protection equipment with frayed/burned webbing. This is clearly defective and non-compliant. OSHA 1926 Subpart M and 1910.140 require that personal fall protection equipment be inspected and removed from service if damaged, frayed, or degraded. Frayed/burned webbing compromises the integrity of the harness/lanyard and must be removed from service immediately.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (fall protection failure could lead to fatal fall)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded
Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 85%
Confidence: high, 0.95
